posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Last time I get this issue too when I tried to upload a new build:

Unable to upload build.zip monday Apps & Developers
Hi, I unable to upload my build since last night, I keep getting unknown error, may I know why? [image]

But it was resolve after 1-2 days without changing anything on our side

And now I’m getting this related error again (the same build.zip was uploaded successfully few days ago), is there any where I can check what is the exact issue that block me from uploading my build? Or is there a page can we check if Monday.com service is down or something?

image1919×937 114 KB

Br, YarHuoy

posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
posts.cookedHtml: I have uploaded successfully after a few hours. I’m wondering is there any page we can check the status like https://status.cloud.google.com/?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, monday.com has a status page which you can find here.
https://status.monday.com/

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @yarhuoy!

Thanks for being so quick. Yes there was a bug surrounding this issue but it should now be fixed as you noted.

As @kolaai suggested, it’s a good idea to keep your eye on our status page for changes/bugs in our platform.

posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @kolaai @Helen , thanks for your respond and the link!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
